This website stores cookies on your computer. These cookies are used to collect information about how you interact with our website and allow us to remember you. We use this information in order to improve and customize your browsing experience and for analytics and metrics about our visitors both on this website and other media. To find out more about the cookies we use, see our Privacy Policy

If you decline, your information won’t be tracked when you visit this website. A single cookie will be used in your browser to remember your preference not to be tracked.

People & WorkplaceMountain View, California

HR Generalist

Who we are

Aurora’s mission is to deliver the benefits of self-driving technology safely, quickly, and broadly.


The Aurora Driver will create a new era in mobility and logistics, one that will bring a safer, more efficient, and more accessible future to everyone.

 

At Aurora, you will tackle massively complex problems alongside other passionate, intelligent individuals, growing as an expert while expanding your knowledge. For the latest news from Aurora, visit aurora.tech or follow us on LinkedIn.

 

Aurora hires talented people with diverse backgrounds who are ready to help build a transportation ecosystem that will make our roads safer, get crucial goods where they need to go, and make mobility more efficient and accessible for all. We’re searching for a driven, highly organized HR Generalist. As an HR Generalist, you will act as the initial point of contact for employees on HR-related questions, maintain accurate records of employee data and policies, support onboarding and offboarding processes, and support audits and compliance requirements. This role reports to our Director of People Operations, Systems, and Analytics (POSA).

As a member of the POSA team, you’ll have the opportunity to help shape company-wide processes, influence Aurora’s culture, and support employees of all levels and teams.


In this role, you will

Effectively prioritize, triage, and resolve Tier 1-2 employee support tickets, submitted through Workday Help
Coordinate with cross-functional partners, including IT, Workplace, Payroll, People, etc to appropriately resolve employee issues
Process various transactions in our HRIS (Workday), including hires, terminations, data changes, and organizational changes
Maintain employee knowledge base articles for
